suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton (CUST_0057) engaged in suspicious activity from February to August 2025. Multiple transactions of similar amounts were observed across different accounts. Notably, on 2025-07-31 and 2025-08-01, multiple ATM withdrawals and deposits were made on the same day, potentially indicating structuring to avoid reporting thresholds.
key_indicators: Multiple ATM transactions on the same day
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: The customer has a high risk rating and is making multiple transactions of similar amounts across different accounts. Multiple ATM withdrawals and deposits on the same day (2025-07-31 and 2025-08-01) are suspicious and may indicate an attempt to avoid reporting thresholds.
